name.fr: Huajuan (petits pains fleurs à la ciboule chinois)

description.en: Steamed Chinese wheat rolls, twisted and folded so their layers fan out like petals when torn open. Brushed between the folds with oil, five-spice and scallion, they are mantou's savory, spiral-layered cousin, served alongside braises and congee.
description.de: Gedämpfte chinesische Weizenbrötchen, gedreht und gefaltet, sodass sich ihre Schichten beim Aufreißen wie Blütenblätter auffächern. Mit Öl, Fünf-Gewürzen und Frühlingszwiebeln gefüllt, sind sie Mantous herzhafter Vetter, serviert zu Schmorgerichten und Congee.
description.es: Panecillos chinos de trigo al vapor, girados y plegados para que sus capas se abran como pétalos al partirlos. Untados entre los pliegues con aceite, cinco especias y cebolleta, son el primo salado y de capas en espiral del mantou, servidos junto a guisos y congee.
description.fr: Petits pains chinois de blé cuits à la vapeur, tordus et pliés pour que leurs couches s'ouvrent comme des pétales une fois déchirés. Garnis d'huile, de cinq-épices et de ciboule, ils sont le cousin salé du mantou, servis avec des braisés et du congee.

origin.note: Same steamed-wheat family as mantou, but layered with a savory scallion-oil filling and twisted into a flower shape before steaming.

keeping.note: Steams back to fluffy from frozen in about 10 minutes; a savory alternative to mantou alongside braises and congee.

method.title: Bloom yeast
method.summary: Stir yeast and sugar into lukewarm water and let stand until foamy, about 15-20 minutes.

method.title: Mix dough
method.summary: Combine flour, baking powder and salt, then knead in the yeast mixture until smooth and elastic, about 15-20 minutes.

method.title: Roll and season
method.summary: Roll the dough into a large thin rectangle, brush with oil, and scatter with five-spice powder, salt and chopped scallions.

method.title: Fold and cut
method.summary: Fold the sheet lengthwise into thirds, then cut crosswise into strips.

method.title: Twist into flowers
method.summary: Stack two strips, press a chopstick down the center lengthwise, stretch the ends, then wrap and tuck to form a twisted flower knot.

method.title: Proof
method.summary: Rest the shaped rolls in the steamer basket about 30 minutes until puffy.

method.title: Steam
method.summary: Steam over boiling water for 15 minutes, then let rest off the heat a few minutes before lifting the lid.

source.adaptation: Cup/tbsp/tsp amounts converted to grams using standard baking references; dough salt and filling salt kept as two separate lines to mirror the source's two stages.
